title: cyclosorus unitus
intro: Cyclosorus unitus, also known as the cinnamon fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus unitus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus unitus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
